hypothesis: If universal machine-learning interatomic potentials trained on broad materials datasets are applied to MOFs with appropriate dispersion corrections, then they will reproduce DFT-level optimized structures, NpT MD stability at 300 K/1 bar, bulk moduli from ±4% equation-of-state fits, and 300 K heat capacities without MOF-specific retraining because their learned representations generalize across inorganic–organic bonding environments.
